title: Dropdown column for templates
excerpt: We have several templates we’re working with, on our board adding them all with DocuGen as a button column can become too many columns! Is there a way to create a button drop down to select different templates to be gene…

posts.author: Rach12 (Rachael )
posts.cookedHtml: We have several templates we’re working with, on our board adding them all with DocuGen as a button column can become too many columns! Is there a way to create a button drop down to select different templates to be generated? Any work arounds? Thank you!
